avalancheActivity.highlights: The new snow and wind slabs represent the main danger. Above approximately 1800 m the wind slabs are larger. Wind slabs are to be evaluated with care and prudence.
avalancheActivity.comment: In all aspects medium-sized and, in isolated cases, large slab avalanches are possible. In particular in the regions with a lot of snow the avalanches can penetrate even deep layers. As a consequence of solar radiation a very precarious avalanche situation will be encountered in some regions.

snowpackStructure.comment: A lot of snow has fallen over a wide area. In some places new snow and wind slabs are lying on a moist old snowpack. The high temperatures as the day progresses will give rise to rapid moistening of the snowpack on steep sunny slopes.

avalancheActivity.highlights: The new snow and wind slabs represent the main danger.
avalancheActivity.comment: In particular in places that are protected from the wind and on steep sunny slopes more mostly small dry and moist avalanches are possible as a consequence of warming.

snowpackStructure.comment: New snow and wind slabs are lying on a moist old snowpack. The solar radiation will give rise as the day progresses to rapid moistening of the snowpack in particular on sunny slopes.
